Thanks for contributing to quale! Please confirm these before submitting.

**Checklist:**

- [ ] I've read the CONTRIBUTING guide
- [ ] My changes are on a feature branch off `master`
- [ ] I've run `python -m pytest tests/` and all tests pass
- [ ] I've added or updated tests for my changes
- [ ] My changes follow the existing code style (ruff, mypy)
- [ ] I've updated the CHANGELOG with my changes

**Type of change:**

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Output/UX improvement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/infrastructure
- [ ] Other

**Description:**

Describe what this PR changes and why.

**Related issues:**

Fixes #
